name: Hallucination Detector
description: Scores AI-generated text for likely hallucinated facts. Detects fabricated precision, invented citations, temporal impossibilities, hedged authority, entity confusion, and overconfident absolutes. Returns a 0-1 risk score with detailed signals. Pay-per-request via x402.
capabilities: Score AI output for hallucination risk (0-1)
Detect fabricated precision, invented citations, temporal impossibilities
Detect hedged authority, entity confusion, overconfident absolutes
